about.title: Full-service digital marketing agency for companies that want to grow with predictability
about.metaDescription: N8X Marketing is a digital marketing agency that combines strategy, social media management, paid traffic, audiovisual production and AI to position brands with consistency and results.
about.subtitle: Strategy, content and brand positioning since {foundedYear}.
about.lead: N8X Marketing is a digital marketing agency that combines strategy, social media management, paid traffic, audiovisual production and artificial intelligence to position brands with consistency and results. We work with companies that want to go beyond "just posting" and are looking for a structured marketing operation, driven by data and aligned with business goals.

practice.title: What we do in practice
practice.intro: We act as a complete marketing team for your business, connecting strategic planning with daily execution. This includes:
items: Brand, audience and competitor diagnosis
Defining positioning and communication tone
Social media management (mainly Instagram, Facebook and LinkedIn)
Paid traffic with a focus on ROI (Meta Ads and Google Ads)
Scripting, filming and editing of professional videos and photos
Landing pages and simple funnels for lead capture
AI applied to marketing to gain scale without losing the brand's creative voice

services.title: Main digital marketing services we offer
services.intro: Among the services most requested by our clients are:
items: Social media management with editorial calendar, design creation, copywriting and metrics tracking
Paid traffic management focused on generating leads, orders and real business opportunities
Audiovisual production (photo and video) for campaigns, ads, digital menus and brand positioning
Page optimization, simple landing page structures and sales funnels
AI implementation in marketing to speed up testing of creatives, scripts and ad variations

audience.title: Who N8X Marketing is the right agency for
audience.intro: We're the ideal choice for companies that need a full-service digital marketing agency with a business mindset, not just post production. We work with:
items: Local businesses that want to be a reference in their region
Bars, restaurants and nightclubs that thrive on foot traffic
Offices, construction firms, engineering companies and B2B services
Brands that already invest in media but can't clearly see the return
Companies that need to turn followers into customers
audience.note: If you're looking for a marketing agency in Santos or the Baixada Santista region with a strategic eye and constant execution, N8X was built exactly for that scenario.

whyFullService.title: Why work with a full-service digital marketing agency
whyFullService.p1: By hiring a full-service digital marketing agency like N8X, your company gains a team that handles your brand positioning, digital presence and demand generation from start to finish. Instead of dealing with several different vendors, you have a single integrated operation, aligned with clear goals.
whyFullService.p2: That means more consistency in communication, less rework, clearer data reading and decisions based on results — not guesswork. For businesses that need to grow with predictability, this integrated vision is essential.

timing.title: How to know it's the right time to invest in digital marketing
timing.intro: A few signs show it's time to have an agency supporting your operation:
items: You rely only on referrals or organic reach
You've already invested in ads but don't know exactly what worked
Your Instagram doesn't convey your company's real potential
There's no clear calendar of actions, campaigns or launches
Your marketing efforts don't talk to your sales team
timing.note: If you recognize yourself in some of these points, it's a good time to talk to a specialized marketing agency that brings strategic vision and execution to your day-to-day.

contactCta.title: Talk to N8X Marketing
paragraphs: Want to understand how N8X can help your brand position itself better and generate more results with digital marketing? Get in touch through the site form or talk directly with our team on WhatsApp.

We'll analyze your company's moment, your goals and your current communication scenario to build an action plan that makes sense for your business — no empty promises, with strategy, execution and data reading.
contactCta.tagline: Your brand sets the message, N8X sets the tone.

about.disclaimer: N8X Marketing (N8X, N8X Company and N8 Company) is the group's digital marketing agency, focused on strategy, paid traffic and content.

funnels.title: Funnels
funnels.empty: No funnels yet. Create your first one.
funnels.whatsappInstanceHint: Instance used to send this funnel's WhatsApp message.
funnels.submissionsCount: {count, plural, =0 {no submissions} one {# submission} other {# submissions}}
funnels.name: Name
funnels.nameHint: Internal label for the funnel (not shown to visitors).
funnels.slugHint: URL identifier: /f/your-slug (lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens).
funnels.localeHint: The funnel's language. Cannot be changed after creation.
funnels.defaultHint: The funnel's standard opening (greeting + data capture). Editable per funnel.
funnels.questionsHint: Questions shown after the default block: multiple choice or a descriptive answer.
funnels.question: Question
funnels.textAnswerHint: The visitor types the answer freely.
funnels.endingsHint: Create one or more endings. Question answers can lead to different endings; the first is the default (normal path).
funnels.meetingLinkHint: Tip: use '{LINK}', '{DATE}' and '{TIME}' in the completion message to send the meeting's link, date and time.
funnels.bonusUrlHint: Direct link to the PDF the visitor can download.
funnels.redirectUrlHint: Page the visitor is sent to at the end (e.g. the course site).
funnels.redirectDelayHint: Time before the automatic redirect. 0 = immediate.
funnels.messageBodyHint: Message sent to the visitor at the end (supports '{NOME}' and '{CARGO}').
funnels.messageUsesCompletion: This funnel sends the completion message (below) via WhatsApp at the end — no extra message needed.
funnels.completionHint: Sent via WhatsApp at the end of any funnel (supports '{NOME}' and '{CARGO}').
funnels.defaultSubtitle: Edit the standard opening used by new funnels. Existing funnels keep their own copy.
funnels.googleSubtitle: Connect the Google account whose calendar will receive meetings booked through funnels.
funnels.googleExpiredHint: Google revoked access (token expired). Meeting funnels stopped scheduling. Click Reconnect to restore it — and publish the OAuth app to production so it doesn't expire again in ~7 days.
funnels.googleDisconnectConfirm: Disconnect the Google account? Meeting funnels won't schedule until you reconnect.
funnels.googleNotConfiguredHint: Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET in the environment to enable scheduling.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp instances
whatsapp.subtitle: Create and manage the Evolution instances used by the funnels, without leaving the panel.
whatsapp.inboxHint: Chatting with contacts happens in the dedicated inbox. Open it to reply.
whatsapp.inboxNotConfigured: Set WHATSAPP_INBOX_URL in the environment to open the conversations inbox (metodon8n panel now; Chatwoot/Evo CRM once self-hosted).
whatsapp.notConfiguredHint: Set EVOLUTION_BASE_URL and EVOLUTION_API_KEY in the environment to manage instances.
whatsapp.createHint: Give it a name and scan the QR code with WhatsApp to connect.
whatsapp.confirmDelete: Delete instance "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
whatsapp.scanHint: Open WhatsApp > Linked devices and scan the code to connect "{name}".
whatsapp.noQr: QR code unavailable. Please try again.
